title: Epic Spartan Weaponry
description: Custom Datapack for Spartan Weaponry and Epic Fight Mod compatibility.
body:
**Thank you for over 5,000 downloads!**

# Epic Spartan Weaponry 
Unleash the might of ancient warriors with the Epic Spartan Weaponry datapack!
This datapack integrates the awesome arsenal of [Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry) with the dynamic combat system of the [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight) Mod.

May this mod/datapack be used in modpacks? Of course! As long as it is published only on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/) or [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/). Uploading it to any other platform is not allowed.

I took the original configuration from the [Epic Fight Spartan Weaponry Mod Compatibility](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/epic-fight-spartan-weaponry-compatibility) datapack, designed for Minecraft 1.16.5, and dedicated a good deal of effort to update it for the latest 1.19.2 version of Spartan Weaponry. ObliviousSpartan changed the registry names for Spartan Weaponry since 1.16.5, so I had to go through each weapon and change the names to fix it.

I did not do the new modded meterials.

## What about 1.20.1?
Use [Epic Fight x Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight-x-spartan-weaponry)

I found a mod at one point that does this so much better by making every weapon slightly different. If I find that mod, I'll link it here, too
